title: Plugin operation envelope
description: Response from /cms-api/v1/admin/plugins/operations/{id} and from any install/update/finalize endpoint. plugin_operations row formatted for the admin UI.

installAction.description: Only emitted by POST /admin/plugins/install. Tells the admin UI whether a fresh install was queued, the request was transparently routed to the updater because a newer version is installed, or the plugin is already installed at the requested version and no operation was dispatched.

redirectedToUpdate.description: Only emitted by POST /admin/plugins/install. True when the install request was transparently routed through the updater because the plugin id was already installed; the UI should show 'Updating <id> from existingVersion to toVersion' instead of the first-install copy.

existingVersion.description: Only set when installAction is update_dispatched or already_installed. Version currently on disk.

requestedVersion.description: Only set when installAction is update_dispatched or already_installed. Version the admin requested via the Install dialog.

diffKind.description: Only set when installAction is update_dispatched. Result of SemverHelper::diffKind so the UI can show migration/breaking-change warnings.

message.description: Human-readable copy. Always emitted for installAction=already_installed; opportunistic for the other two values.

oneOf.description: Operation dispatched (installAction = install_dispatched | update_dispatched). The standard plugin_operations envelope.
No-op (installAction = already_installed). No plugin_operations row was created — the plugin is already at the requested version.
Legacy / non-install endpoints (status sub-resources) that do not emit installAction.
